features.name: signed indexed part-select with variable offset
features.description: Code should include an upward indexed part-select (+:) where the base index is cast with $signed(), using a multi-bit signal as the dynamic offset

features.name: conditional signed shift with negative index detection
features.description: Code should include a combinational always block that checks whether a signal is negative using $signed() comparison, then performs a left shift for negative indices and a right shift for non-negative indices

features.name: x-literal masking in bitwise or for undefined shift bits
features.description: Code should include a 4'bx literal ANDed with a shift-derived bitmask and then ORed into a result to model undefined bits introduced by out-of-range shifts
